title: Lava Chicken Boss
description: Adds a new boss and an exciting battle with him, as well as his minions and some items.
body:
**Introduces the "Lava Chicken Boss" — a powerful new enemy with an exciting boss fight.**



### **Mechanics:**
- The boss has a 3% chance to spawn when any chicken burns in lava.
- It features multiple attack types.
- It has its own custom spawn and death animations (to be improved in the future).
- If the player stays at a distance, the boss can call down meteors.
- During close combat, the boss can summon minions to aid it.
- Minions come in two types:
  - Melee — attacks up close.
  - Ranged (Wizard) — launches fire projectiles and can heal nearby minions (but not the boss).
- Minions will die upon contact with water (the boss is currently immune to water).Minions have a chance to spawn in a feral variant with enhanced stats.
- Upon defeating the boss, the player will receive a configurable reward.


### **Future Plans:**
- More settings in the config file.
- Boss fight music during the encounter.
- New types of minions.
- Additional attacks and improved boss movement in the world.
- Trophy rework.
- A custom music disc dropped by the boss.


### **Help/Support/Suggestions:**

[Join the discord](https://discord.gg/peU9jS8rhA)
